title: Bliss Shaders
description: A well performing fantasy styled shaderpack with emphasis on scene variation and customization.
body:
# About The Shader
_**Bliss is a big edit of Chocapic13's V9.0 - V9.1; [The original shaders can be found here!](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/chocapic13-shaders)**_

I liked chocapic13's shaders, but i could not be satisfied. I decided i wanted to try and bring my own visual goals out in the shader while i learn how to develop shaders. So here i am, with a pretty sizeable edit that stands to be quite different from the original shader!
# Requirements
- The mod ["Iris"](https://www.irisshaders.dev/download). The mod ["Optifine"](https://optifine.net/downloads) might work as well.
- Designed for Minecraft versions 1.17.0+
- AMD, Intel, and NVidia graphics are supported
- Apple devices have limited support due to OpenGL version restrictions. [Please refer to this thread for more info](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader/issues/181)
# Questions? Bugs? Want to help test unstable versions?
- [Contact me on my Discord server](https://discord.gg/8nVt56H9zH)
- [Alternatively, contact me on the ShaderLabs Discord](https://discord.gg/RpzWN9S)
- [Test the unstable github branch here (there is a download guide in the README)](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader/tree/Unstable)
- [Report a bug, request a feature, or ask a question here](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader/issues/new/choose)
- [Want to support me? Throw money at me here](https://ko-fi.com/xonkdev)
